title: HDFC Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
